/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/http_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/conversation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/llm/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/llm/provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/llm/tool_exec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/llm/persistent_shell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/mcp/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/mcp/manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/ui/chat_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/ui/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/ui/animation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/ui/text_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llmchat.dir/src/ui/markdown.cpp.o -o llmchat  -lcurl -lncursesw -lpthread
